content.en:
Ye Xingchen and Ye Xingyue also came to the place where so many True Ancestors gathered for the first time, although they used to often wander around the outside world, the places they went to were all small places, even if they went to some big cities, they could only see very few strong people.

And now, this temporarily built Vajra True Kingdom Giant City has gathered a large number of True Ancestors, including the Supreme True Ancestor and the Invincible True Ancestor, and the terrifying aura is enough to suffocate people.

Usually, when they were wandering, they always thought that they were very strong, after all, there were not many people who were stronger than them wherever they went, but here, there were too many True Ancestors who were stronger than them.

The dense aura of the Invincible True Ancestor and the Supreme True Ancestor was like pillars of energy, pouring into the depths of the sky, as if it were shocking the others around them.

"I didn't expect that there were so many Supreme True Ancestors and Invincible True Ancestors in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm!"

Ye Xingchen muttered.

The human race is very powerful now, but the number of Xeon True Ancestors is too small, most of them are the Xeon True Ancestors of the Nine Extremes Legion, and the others are also cultivated by his father Ye Tian, or have a good relationship with Ye Tian.

But those Supreme True Ancestors were placed here, and they were like a drop in the ocean.

At this moment, Ye Xingchen and Ye Xingyue's slightly impetuous hearts calmed down a little, and they also realized that their current strength was not qualified to be arrogant.

This temporary giant city is known as the City of Ten Thousand Ancestors.

A large number of True Ancestors poured into Wanzu City, but most of them were there to see the excitement, and they were not True Ancestors under the age of 10 million.

In fact, there are not many true ancestors under the age of 10 million, for example, the human race can only find dozens at most, and they are basically ordinary true ancestors, and they don't dare to participate at all, otherwise they will definitely die.

In half a month, almost all the True Ancestors who could come came, and the other True Ancestors who didn't come also paid attention to this True Ancestor Battle through various channels.

And the world that selected 100,000 True Ancestors is in Wanzu City, a world created by the joint efforts of major forces, even if more True Ancestors go in to fight, it is difficult to shatter this world, and its solidity is far beyond that of the True Kingdom.

this day.

True ancestors under the age of 10 million have been tested one after another and entered that world.

"There are so many people, there are more than three million true ancestors!"

Ye Tian was a little surprised.

Although he also knew that there were many True Ancestors in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm now, they were far less rare than before, especially in the last few million years, those countless geniuses had grown up, making the number of True Ancestors in the entire Xuanxu Ancient Realm multiply a lot.

For example, the human race, the number of true ancestors has reached nearly one million today, not to mention the true ancestors of the Void Heaven True Kingdom and the Temple of the Gods, and there are definitely a lot of true ancestors of other forces.

How many forces are there in the entire Xuanxu Ancient Realm? Ye Tian couldn't count, there were indeed not many True Ancestors under the age of 10 million in a single force, but they had accumulated a lot.

After the three million True Ancestors entered the world, they were scattered one by one, even though the world was very large, but the True Ancestors' divine consciousness was so powerful, it was very difficult to hide it.

And so, the fight began!

True Ancestors who belong to the same force unite together to besiege other True Ancestors, but once they are targeted by a stronger True Ancestor, that force may be destroyed.

Every moment, a large number of True Ancestors fell, and some weak True Ancestors were timid, ignoring the orders of the forces behind them, and rushed out of the world directly, not daring to fight anymore.

But will they end well when they return to the forces?

Abrupt.

A True Ancestor burst out with a strength comparable to that of the Supreme True Ancestor, killing many elite True Ancestors in an instant, shocking the audience.

"Who is that person? He has become the strongest true ancestor in thousands of years, it's too against the sky!"

There is an invincible true ancestor exclaimed.

Ye Tian looked over, copied the talent to probe, and knew the other party's situation.

"True Ancestor of the Zixia Sect!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Judging from the introduction of the copy talent, this true ancestor is called Mingyu True Ancestor, and he is also considered a top genius in the entire Xuanxu Ancient Realm, but a hundred years ago, he was only an elite true ancestor.

Spanning the top True Ancestor in a hundred years and directly becoming a Supreme True Ancestor is definitely not something that can be done by normal means.

Moreover, judging from the breath of life of the other party, although it is like a brilliant day, it is a bit like a great day that is about to end, exuding the last brilliance.

"Use the way to consume potential and vitality to forcibly improve your strength, and your life will not be long!"

Ye Tian shook his head.

Obviously, there are forces that do this.

Moreover, it was definitely not only the Zixia Sect that did this, there were definitely other forces that did the same.

Ye Tian saw it, and the other True Ancestors soon saw it too.

The Invincible True Ancestors were not stupid, and they quickly guessed the reason, and some of them were even participants in the creation of this kind of True Ancestor!

Subsequently, a Supreme True Ancestor appeared, which simply shocked the audience.

Somewhere in the world.

Ye Xingchen encountered a Supreme True Ancestor, and this scene was seen by many people.

Because Ye Tian's fame is too great, Ye Xingchen, the son of Ye Tian, is also known to some true ancestors.

"Ten Thousand Law True Ancestor, I'm afraid your son is in some danger!"

The Golden Light Sword Venerable of the Heavenly Sword Sect spoke, his gaze even a little provocative.

Because the Supreme True Ancestor who encountered Ye Xingchen was a True Ancestor of the Heavenly Sword Sect, the Heavenly Sword Sect had suffered many losses at the hands of Ye Tian, and had lost many Supreme True Ancestors and top True Ancestors.

Therefore, the Golden Light Sword Venerable was very unhappy with Ye Tian.

Of course, he didn't dare to provoke Ye Tian, otherwise Ye Tian could easily kill him.

But this time, Ye Xingchen encountered the Heavenly Sword Sect's supreme true ancestor, and he couldn't be blamed.

He didn't think that Ye Xingchen had the combat power of the strongest True Ancestor, he had also heard of Ye Xingchen, in terms of talent and potential, he was already a top True Ancestor at a young age, and he was a top True Ancestor who relied on his own cultivation achievements, not a top True Ancestor that was generated.

But even so, Ye Xingchen would not be able to become the strongest true ancestor in a short period of time, unless Ye Tian was willing to abolish his son, but that was not necessary at all, and he would not think that Ye Tian would be willing to do so.

Therefore, Ye Tian is at most a top-notch True Ancestor combat power, plus he has some chassis, he may be able to compete with the Xeon True Ancestor for a short time, but it will definitely not take long before he will be killed.

Moreover, the Heavenly Sword Sect, the strongest true ancestor, also had hole cards, and even the Heavenly Sword Sect handed him a medium forbidden strange object that could burst out with a forbidden blow.

"It's a bit early to talk about this now, maybe your sect's Flash Sword Venerable will be in danger!"

Ye Tian said calmly.

within the world.

Ye Xingchen encountered the Flash Sword Venerable, and when he saw Ye Xingchen, the Flash Sword Venerable's expression moved, and he also recognized Ye Xingchen.

"Ye Xingchen, the son of the True Ancestor of Ten Thousand Laws, if I kill him, the Heavenly Sword Sect will definitely reward me greatly!"

Flash Sword Venerable said excitedly.

As for whether he would offend Ten Thousand Laws True Ancestor Ye Tian because of this, he didn't care.

He knew that he didn't have much time left, maybe after coming out of the forbidden treasure land, he would die with a limited lifespan, and he could only be reincarnated with the help of the Heavenly Sword Sect, and everyone was dead, and he was afraid that Ye Tian would not succeed?

Moreover.

Once he is reincarnated, his identity has changed, and it is difficult for Ye Tian to find him.

Moreover, if he has made a great contribution, the Heavenly Sword Sect will definitely reward him heavily and vigorously cultivate his reincarnated body, he may be able to transcend this life and become a true supreme Dao ancestor, rather than a supreme true ancestor like him.

However, many True Ancestors don't know that once the potential and life force are exhausted, the foundation of the True Ancestor will be completely destroyed, and it will be difficult for ordinary reincarnation methods to erase this influence, and the potential of the second life will be very low, and it will be difficult to grow.

Ye Tian knew this reason, but he wouldn't say it, after all, the major forces had done this, squeezing those geniuses, if he said it, whether anyone believed it was a question, the key was to offend all the forces.

Flash Sword Venerable doesn't know anything, he doesn't know anything, and he's still dreaming!

"Die!"

Flash Sword Venerable made a move, and a sword dao technique, the flash cross sword technique, was cut out, which was also his famous dao technique, and it was very powerful.

However, at this very moment.

Ye Xingchen's body erupted with a stellar light, turning into a canopy defense, which was a defensive Dao technique that was incomparably in line with his own Star Dao - the Star Sky Canopy Technique!

This sword technique slashed at the Star Sky Curtain Technique, and it didn't even break its defenses.

"What, you're also the Supreme True Ancestor!!

Flash Sword Venerable was shocked.

Not only was the Flash Sword Venerable shocked, but the Golden Light Sword Venerable and many other Invincible True Ancestors were shocked, and they looked at Ye Tian one by one.

"Ten Thousand Law True Ancestor, you are so bold that you even sacrificed your own son!"

The Golden Light Sword Venerable was surprised.

Ye Tian stared at the Golden Light Sword Venerable with an idiot look and said, "Golden Light Sword Venerable, are you a fool, do you think I forcibly improved my son's strength?" He relied on his own improved strength, but he didn't consume any potential, if you can even see this, then the so-called invincible True Ancestor strength could not be forcibly improved?"

The other Invincible True Ancestors carefully probed and found that Ye Xingchen's foundation was very solid, and he was not the strongest True Ancestor that he had urged at all.

Moreover, Ye Xingchen's True Ancestor power actually contained the power of the Dark Forbidden Spirit.

Suddenly, the Invincible True Ancestors were jealous.
